Video.summary: Bob paints an untouched winter scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Tranquil Dawn

Video.summary: Bob paints a hushed valley.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Quiet Mountain River

Video.summary: Bob paints a scene within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain in an Oval

Video.summary: Using only gray and white to paint a cabin amid frozen mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Shades of Gray

Video.summary: Bob Ross offers tips and shares painting techniques.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Valley View

Video.summary: Bob paints a quiet brook in a forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Serenity

Video.summary: The fall breeze rustles in the trees and skips across crisp still waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Autumn Splendor

Video.summary: Bob paints a mountain and small waterfall.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Royal Majesty

Video.summary: As the night settles over a rocky coast, a warm glow of the ending day still sits in the sky.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Ebony Sea

Video.summary: Icy mountains withstand winter's rigors.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Mountain

Video.summary: Bob paints a waterfall on black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Evening Waterfall

Video.summary: Bob creates a tranquil landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Soft Mountain Glow

Video.summary: The glistening sun peeks through the trees in this wintry scene; Bob Ross creates a cold day warmed by daystar radiance.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Sun

Video.summary: Bob paints a chilly autumn landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Change of Seasons

Video.summary: Bob paints a rickety forest shack.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hidden Delight

Video.summary: A scenic world of green trees and bushes reflecting into calm waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Meadow Lake

Video.summary: Bob overlaps summer and winter on black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Double Take

Video.summary: Bob paints flowering trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: A Trace of Spring

Video.summary: In the midst of the forest flows a stream that splashes and trickles endlessly along.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bubbling Stream

Video.summary: Bob paints a barn in winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Barn at Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a mirror image.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Snow Birch

Video.summary: Bob paints a snow-tipped valley.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: First Snow

Video.summary: Bob paints a winding meadow stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Meadow Stream

Video.summary: Bob paints a gurgling brook on black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bubbling Brook

Video.title: The Property Line

Video.title: Bright Autumn Trees

Video.title: Mountain by the Sea

Video.summary: Glowing red peaks loom over a lazy stream.

Video.title: Nature's Paradise

Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

Video.summary: Bob demonstrates a new painting medium.

Video.title: Mountain at Sunset

Video.title: Mountain Hideaway

Video.summary: Cottony clouds envelop green hills.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Country Charm

Video.summary: A gentle breeze sways palm trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Tropical Seascape

Video.summary: A slow river winds around colorful foliage, with the final embers of sunlight ahead.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black River
